diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class, exported types (Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Next, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, ValidationTargets, Input, Schema, ToSchema, TypedResponse, Context)
+- Internal names: Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exporting core classes and types
+- Copy-safe detail: Re-exports Hono class from ./hono and type exports from ./context, ./request, and ./client
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Variables, Next, Input, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H, NotFoundResponse, NotFoundHandler, HandlerResponse, RouterRoute, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface
+- Internal names: RouterRoute, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, BlankInput, BlankRecord, IfAnyThenEmptyObject, IsAny, JSONValue, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MergeTypedResponse, MergeMiddlewareResponse, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MergeResponseFormat, MergeTypedResponse, AddSchemaIfHasResponse, HonoBase
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for Hono framework
+- Copy-safe detail: Defines value types (Bindings, Variables, Env, Next, Input), route definitions (RouterRoute), handler types (Handler, MiddlewareHandler, H), and handler interfaces (HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface) with over 20 handler variants
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names: HonoBase, HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Hono class extending HonoBase with SmartRouter by default
+- Copy-safe detail: 34 lines, constructor sets up router and inherits from HonoBase
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: HonoBase class, HonoOptions type, compose
+- Internal names: Context, Router, Env, H, HandlerInterface, MergePath, MergeSchemaPath, MiddlewareHandler, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, Next, NotFoundHandler, OnHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler, _basePath, #path, routes, methods (get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all, on, use), #clone, #notFoundHandler, #dispatch, fetch, request, fire, route, basePath, mount, #addRoute, #handleError
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono base class with routing, composable handlers, and execution dispatch
+- Copy-safe detail: 545 lines, implements request routing, middleware composition, and fetch/request methods
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class, Get/Getters, Set/Setter, text, json, html, body, redirect, render, setRenderer, header, status, set, get, var, newResponse, layout
+- Internal names: HonoRequest, Result, Env, Input, NotFoundHandler, RouterRoute, TypedResponse, ResponseHeader, HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase, resolveCallback, ContentfulStatusCode, RedirectStatusCode, StatusCode, BaseMime, InvalidJSONValue, IsAny, JSONParsed, JSONValue, Data, ExecutionContext, ContextVariableMap, ContextRenderer, DefaultRenderer, Renderer, PropsForRenderer, Layout, NewResponse, BodyRespond, TextRespond, JSONRespond, JSONRespondReturn, HTMLRespond, SetHeadersOptions, SetHeaders, ResponseHeadersInit, ResponseInit
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/headers, ./utils/html, ./utils/mime, ./utils/types, HonoRequest
+- Plain-English summary: Request context with request/response interaction and response rendering
+- Copy-safe detail: 780 lines, implements response methods (text, json, html, body, redirect, notFound), context variables, and execution context
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class, cloneRawRequest
+- Internal names: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, Input, InputToDataByTarget, ParamKeyToRecord, ParamKeys, RemoveQuestion, ValidationTargets, Result, RouterRoute, Body, BodyCache, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions, Simplify, UnionToIntersection, CustomHeader, RequestHeader, decodeURIComponent_, getQueryParam, getQueryParams, tryDecode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/headers, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request handler class with parameter/query/header/body parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: 505 lines, implements param(), query(), queries(), header(), parseBody(), json(), text(), arrayBuffer(), bytes(), blob(), addValidatedData(), valid(), url, method, matchedRoutes, routePath getters
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol export
+- Internal names: (none)
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Symbol constant for route matching result
+- Copy-safe detail: 1 line, exports unique symbol for route matching identification
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody, BodyData, ParseBodyOptions
+- Internal names: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, parseFormData, handleParsingAllValues, handleParsingNestedValues
+- Imports or neighbors: ../request
+- Plain-English summary: Body parsing utility for form data and multipart
+- Copy-safe detail: 233 lines, parses form data with all and dot options, includes helper functions for nested and array values
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose
+- Internal names: Context, Env, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility based on koa-compose pattern
+- Copy-safe detail: 73 lines, implements dispatch pattern with error and not-found handlers
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names: ContentfulStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP exception class for authentication failures
+- Copy-safe detail: 78 lines, extends Error with res property and getResponse method
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError
+- Internal names: ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode, Fetch, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client/client, ./client/utils, ./client/types
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client entry point re-exporting core client functionality
+- Copy-safe detail: 17 lines, simple re-export of client functions and types
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc (function)
+- Internal names: ClientRequestImpl, Callback, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol, Client, ClientRequestOptions, UnionToIntersection, Hono
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Proxy-based HTTP client for route-based API calls
+- Copy-safe detail: 223 lines, creates proxy tree for route-based API navigation
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError, Client, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions, ClientRequest, ClientResponse, ApplyGlobalResponse, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Internal names: MethodNameAll, StandardMethods, ExpandAllMethod, HonoRequest, BuildSearchParamsFn, ClientErrorStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, HasRequiredKeys, ResponseFormat, KnownResponseFormat, Endpoint, ExtractSchema, SuccessStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, BuildSearch, BuildPath, BuildTypedURL, HonoURL, ParseHostName, TrimStartSlash, TrimEndSlash, IsLiteral, ApplyParam, IsEmptyObject, TypedURL, TypedURL, Response (interface), InferResponseTypeFromEndpoint, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, PathToChain, Callback, CallbackOptions, ObjectType, GlobalResponseDefinition, ToEndpoints, ModRoute, ModSchema, PickSchema, PickResponseByStatusCode
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for client API with schema extraction and URL construction
+- Copy-safe detail: 393 lines, extensive conditional types for request/response inference and path construction
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names: DetailedError, fetchRP, ClientErrorStatusCode, ContentfulStatusCode, ServerErrorStatusCode, ClientResponse, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ObjectType
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Client utilities for URL building, search params, and object merging
+- Copy-safe detail: 114 lines, utility functions for client request building
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names: nullBodyResponses, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Fetch response parser with intelligent content detection and error handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, detects content-type (application/json vs text), throws DetailedError with detail on non-OK status codes
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire, handle
+- Internal names: Hono, Env, Schema, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter entry point
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, registers Hono app with addEventListener('fetch', handle(app))
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle
+- Internal names: Hono, Env, Schema, FetchEvent, Handler, HandleOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./types (./adapter/service-worker/handler)
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch event handler implementation
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, wraps app.fetch in async block with fallback to global fetch on 404
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent
+- Internal names: ExtendableEvent
+- Imports or neighbors: (none)
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker event type definitions
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, extends Event with waitUntil, clientId, preloadResponse, request, respondWith
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
